DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_FB_ADS_PERFORMANCE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_FB_ADS_PERFORMANCE]
( 
	[AccountID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CampaignID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[AdsetID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[AdID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[PublisherPlatform] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[PlatformPosition] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[DateStart] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[DateStop] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Clicks] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CostPerActionType] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[CPC] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CPM] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CPP] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CTR] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Currency] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Frequency] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Impressions] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[InlineLinkClicks] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[OutboundClicksCtr] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[OutboundClicks] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[Reach] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Spend] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[UniqueClicks] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[UniqueCtr] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[UniqueInlineLinkClickCtr] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[UniqueInlineLinkClicks] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[UniqueLinkClicksCtr] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[UniqueOutboundClicksCtr] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[UniqueOutboundClicks] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[Actions] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[ActionValues] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[UniqueActions] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[VideoAvgTimeWatchedActions] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[VideoP100WatchedActions] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[VideoP25WatchedActions] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[VideoP50WatchedActions] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[VideoP75WatchedActions] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[VideoP95WatchedActions] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
